profiles.quality_notes: Generic partner table; customer_rank and supplier_rank distinguish roles. user_id is text (account manager name, not structured FK). x_strategic_value nullable. No direct hierarchy or parent_id — uses rank ordering instead.

Represents customer orders. client_order_ref (e.g., 'PO-8821') is the external cross-reference to purchase orders. No shipment_id link visible — junction must be inferred via product/invoice chains. state indicates order lifecycle.

invoice_origin is text (PO reference, e.g., 'PO-8821'), not structured FK. No direct link to sale.order — must cross-reference via client_order_ref. payment_state critical for cash flow analysis. amount_total in EUR.
12 SKUs total. x_temp_min/x_temp_max define cold-chain constraints. list_price may not equal cost-of-goods. category_id semantic but numeric.
Overlaps structurally with res.partner; supplier_rank=1 distinguishes. property_payment_term_id references payment.term (0/30/45/60 days). Only 8 suppliers — small base.
Lookup table; 4 records. Referenced by Supplier.property_payment_term_id. Days numeric (0=immediate, 30=net 30, etc.).

TMS shipment records; uid='SH-2049' is shipment ID. deliveries is nested array (SKU + quantity). No order_id or partner_id visible — join via product SKU or inferred from invoice. tracking.eta is epoch. temperature_setpoint (min/max °C) for cold chain. CRITICAL: 'Delayed' status in SH-2049 is the incident trigger.
10 vehicles. is_refrigerated boolean; type='frigo'/'fourgon'. license_plate is unique identifier. No shipment assignment visible — inferred via carrier assignment to transports.
14 drivers. certifications array (ADR, FIMO). No employee_id link — distinct from HR layer (to be reconciled). No shipment-driver assignment visible in schema.
10 carriers (ColdRoad, FreshMove, ColdFast Express, etc.). reliability_score 0–1. service_type ('Cold-chain', etc.). name is source of truth for matching external references.
12 claims. customer_ref and shipment_ref are text, not FK. type qualifies (Billing dispute, Temperature breach). opened_at/closed_at date strings. Sparse — only ~40% of shipments have claims.

CRITICAL FUZZY-MATCH TASK: raw_name is unstructured ('Med Pharma SARL', 'MEDPHARMA (old)') and contains obvious duplicates. notes field flags suspicions ("Doublon probable"). Must be rapprochés to Odoo.res.partner via fuzzy matching + email domain. 11 records; legacy quality.

6 records total — sparse historical log. hours_late quantifies breach; penalty_amount in EUR. customer_ref and shipment_ref are text. month is YYYY-MM. Insufficient to infer penalty_rate per SLA; must be cross-referenced with PDF contracts.

Config/reference data (6 rows). Route format 'Paris->Lyon' (semantic, not structured). Backup Carrier is text (must match carriers.name). Emergency Rate as text '€2,400' (must parse). Rarely updated; static routing reference.

HR master; 16 employees. NO manager_id column — organigramme hidden; must reconstruct via title_rank + Service hierarchy + email escalades. Poste is text role (not structured role_id). Email is contact. Date d'entrée is hire date. Source of truth for HR layer, but incomplete without email parsing.

19 rows. Customer name is text (must fuzzy-match to Odoo.res.partner). Account Manager is employee name (text, must match company_directory.Nom). Priority Tier (Platinum/Gold/...) soft classification. Escalation Required boolean. Enrichment layer, not canonical customer source.

29 rows of key-value pairs (French labels, unstructured). Poste='Chiffre d'affaires (CA, 12 mois)', Valeur='€1,689,940'. Valeur is text with currency/%. Must parse numerically; reshape to schema. 'Période' header suggests 12-month rolling window. Single snapshot, not time-series.

26 rows. Warehouse ('WH-1', 'WH-2') and SKU (must match product_id) form composite key. Available/Reserved units numeric. Snapshot (no timestamps); static view of on-hand stock. PHARMA-22 split across WH-1 (800 avail, 600 reserved) and WH-2 (200/100).

Physical delivery note document. Links Shipment SH-2049 to PO PO-8821. First-line headers confirm metadata but PDF must be parsed for full content (line items, signatures, timestamps, actual weight/volume).

Invoice document. Links INV-7742 to PO PO-8821. Amount (€186,000 per Odoo) and payment terms must be extracted from PDF (Odoo has amount_total but SLA penalty/terms from PDF). Evidence for facture liée to SH-2049.

Original purchase order. Confirms customer (MedPharma) and PO number. Line items, unit prices, delivery address, special instructions (cold chain, SLA) must be extracted. Source of truth for commercial terms vs Odoo sale.order.

Service Level Agreement for MedPharma cold-chain products. Temperature bounds (2–8°C) confirmed; penalty rate (€7,000/h hypothesized from brief, must extract) and escalation contacts (Sarah Martin) on document. Critical for assessing SH-2049 breach impact. Single SLA document (strategic customer).

From ColdRoad (carrier) notifying operations of delay. Raw .eml RFC822 format. Subject and body must be parsed for delay reason, ETA, severity. Evidence for SH-2049 Delayed status and trigger for escalation.

From MedPharma procurement confirming delivery. Signals expected delivery of PO-8821. Parsing must extract confirmation details and reconcile with shipment status (is SH-2049 the delivery for PO-8821?).
From Sarah Martin stating 'MedPharma is strategic'. Evidence for strategic_value attribute and account manager relationship. Signature must extract title (Responsable Grands Comptes) and org unit.
Emergency capacity offer from ColdFast. Cross-references backup_matrix. Must extract capacity (20 palettes) and rate (€2,400). Evidence for rescue option for SH-2049.
From FreshMarket confirming delivery of PO-8822. Signals SH-2050 resolution (FreshMove carrier). Parsing extracts SKU/quantity and delivery confirmation.
From AutoParts SAS (supplier) asking about invoice payment terms. Evidence for supplier relationships and payment term questions. Must extract invoice reference and payment logic.

From Sarah to Jules (director commercial) escalading SH-2049 risk. Subject: 'Escalade risque livraison MedPharma'. Signature and recipients extract org hierarchy (Sarah → Jules). Evidence for reporting_to reconstruction and incident severity.
From Karim to Thomas (driver). Subject in UTF-8 (Tournée de demain - prise en charge). Dispatch assignment; must extract driver assignment, route, date. Evidence for driver→shipment link.

From Jules to Philippe (CEO) for approval of MedPharma rescue. Escalation to top; subject 'Pour validation DG: secours MedPharma'. Evidence for org hierarchy (Jules reports to Philippe) and incident severity (DG approval required).
From Nadia to Karim re: driver scheduling next week. Org unit: Operations/Dispatch. Evidence for org hierarchy and scheduling authority.
From Nathalie (accounting/collections) to Sophie (finance) re: customer follow-ups. Revenue/cash flow signal; must extract which customers are being chased for payment.
From Olivier updating internal directory. May contain employee changes (new hires, departures, role changes). Evidence for HR master data sync.

findings.detail: La relation 'fulfilled_by' (Order fulfilled_by Shipment) n'a que 1 instance alors qu'il y a 28 Orders et 28 Shipments, tous deux complets sur le reste de la chaîne (places=28, creates=28, bills=28, operated_by=28, departs_from=28, contains=28). Seul o-881 -> sh-2049 est relié : 27 Orders et 27 Shipments sont donc orphelins l'un de l'autre, brisant le pont Order<->Shipment de la couche operational. Les correspondances existent probablement dans les sources (numérotation parallèle o-88x / sh-20xx, refs croisées Dashdoc/Odoo) mais n'ont pas été inférées par la passe Relationship Discovery. NE PAS fabriquer ces arêtes sans evidence par paire : à renvoyer à la passe relations pour ré-extraction.

'is_a' (Driver is_a Employee) n'a que 3 instances pour 14 Drivers. Cela peut être légitime (chauffeurs des transporteurs externes non salariés de la société) mais l'écart 3/14 mérite une open_question : distinguer les chauffeurs internes (is_a Employee) des chauffeurs sous-traitants. Pas de correction automatique sans source RH confirmant le statut de chacun.

'governed_by' (Customer governed_by Contract) = 1 pour 18 Customers, car une seule entité Contract (ct-001, MedPharma) existe dans les sources. Cohérent avec les données publiées (un seul PDF SLA/contrat), mais à signaler : 17 clients sans contrat rattaché. Ne RIEN inventer — laisser tel quel avec open_question au niveau des clients concernés.

La détection mécanique ne signale aucun 'reports_to' à confidence > 0.85 (liste d'anomalies vide), ce qui est cohérent avec la nature reconstruite de l'organigramme (confidence attendue ~0.70 + open_question). Je ne peux toutefois pas vérifier la confidence par arête depuis le profil compact ; à confirmer que les 14 'reports_to' portent bien evidence non vide + open_question signalant l'inférence.
